title: 市场操守三禁 / Three prohibitions
point: 禁内幕交易、虚假交易/操纵、散布虚假误导信息。 / No insider trading, false trading/manipulation, or false information.
keyfacts: 违者民事/刑事责任 / Civil/criminal liability
sourceRef: Securities and Futures Act — Market Conduct

title: 内幕交易 / Insider trading
point: 用"未普遍公开且若公开会对价格/价值有重大影响"的信息买卖或泄露=违法。 / Trading while holding information not generally available that would have a material effect on price/value is unlawful.
keyfacts: SFA: not generally available + material effect / SFA test
sourceRef: Securities and Futures Act — Market Conduct
